fetch_primary.title: Redwick Oral History Room accession history
fetch_primary.content: Accession note 1 states that the Redwick Oral History Room began in the back room of Bell & Finch Books at 9 Market Street. It moved to the present repository in 1998; the note gives no reason for the move.
